meta.title: Borges Bibliography Builder
meta.description: Launch WordPress Playground with the Borges Bibliography Builder plugin installed for quick evaluation.
meta.author: danknauss

steps.code:
Welcome to Borges Bibliography Builder. Use the Bibliography block below, then paste one or more sample entries into the Paste / Import field (separate entries with a blank line).

10.1145/3368089.3409742

10.1038/s41586-020-2649-2

PMID:26673779

@article{knuth1984literate,
  author = {Knuth, Donald E.},
  title = {Literate Programming},
  journal = {The Computer Journal},
  year = {1984},
  volume = {27},
  number = {2},
  pages = {97--111},
  doi = {10.1093/comjnl/27.2.97}
}

Tip: In the block sidebar, try changing citation style and export actions (CSL-JSON, BibTeX, RIS).

EOT; wp_update_post( array( 'ID' => 1, 'post_title' => 'Borges Bibliography Playground Starter', 'post_content' => $post_content, ) );
